# Narrative Protocol - LLMs.txt

## Overview
Narrative Protocol is a World State & Event Engine for versioned world simulations, AI/direct event mutation, and on-chain attested execution.

## Base URL
`https://api.narrativeprotocol.com`

## Authentication
- All `/api/*` endpoints require: `Authorization: Bearer <api-key>`
- Debug token auth is removed.
- Public execution uses `/app/*` and wallet signatures.

## Core Routes

### Worlds
- `GET /api/worlds`
- `POST /api/worlds`
- `GET /api/worlds/:id`
- `PUT /api/worlds/:id`
- `DELETE /api/worlds/:id`
- `POST /api/worlds/:id/publish`
- `POST /api/worlds/:id/unpublish`

### Entity Schemas & Attributes (World-scoped)
- `GET /api/worlds/:worldId/entity-schemas`
- `POST /api/worlds/:worldId/entity-schemas`
- `GET /api/worlds/:worldId/entity-schemas/:schemaId/attributes`
- `POST /api/worlds/:worldId/entity-schemas/:schemaId/attributes`
- `GET /api/worlds/:worldId/entity-schemas/:schemaId/attributes/:name`
- `PUT /api/worlds/:worldId/entity-schemas/:schemaId/attributes/:name`
- `DELETE /api/worlds/:worldId/entity-schemas/:schemaId/attributes/:name`

### Events & Versions (World-scoped)
- `GET /api/worlds/:worldId/events`
- `POST /api/worlds/:worldId/events`
- `GET /api/worlds/:worldId/events/:eventId/event-versions`
- `POST /api/worlds/:worldId/events/:eventId/event-versions`
- `POST /api/worlds/:worldId/events/:eventId/event-versions/:version/publish`

### Deployments (World-scoped)
- `GET /api/worlds/:worldId/deployments`
- `POST /api/worlds/:worldId/deployments`
- `POST /api/worlds/:worldId/deployments/:deploymentId/execute`
- `POST /api/worlds/:worldId/deployments/:deploymentId/lock`
- `GET /api/worlds/:worldId/deployments/:deploymentId/history?page=1&limit=10`
- `GET /api/worlds/:worldId/deployments/:deploymentId/event-bindings`
- `POST /api/worlds/:worldId/deployments/:deploymentId/event-bindings`
- `GET /api/worlds/:worldId/deployments/:deploymentId/entity-instances`
- `POST /api/worlds/:worldId/deployments/:deploymentId/entity-instances`

### Public App Execution
- `POST /app/deployments/:address/execute`
- Requires `wallet`, `signature`, `message`
- If priced (`executionSettings.priceUsd`), include `X-Payment` (x402)

### AI Models
- `GET /api/ai-models`

## Event Version Schema Changes
- `reads` -> `readEntities`
- `stateChangeSchema` -> `entityChangeSettings`
- `resultSchema` -> `outputSchema`
- Added `mutationSettings` (`ai` or `direct`)
- Added `executionSettings` (`admin`, `public`, `cron` + optional `priceUsd`, `cron`)

## Quick Flow
1. Create world: `POST /api/worlds`
2. Create schema: `POST /api/worlds/:worldId/entity-schemas`
3. Add attributes: `POST /api/worlds/:worldId/entity-schemas/:schemaId/attributes`
4. Create event: `POST /api/worlds/:worldId/events`
5. Create deployment: `POST /api/worlds/:worldId/deployments`
6. Create instance: `POST /api/worlds/:worldId/deployments/:deploymentId/entity-instances`
7. Execute event: `POST /api/worlds/:worldId/deployments/:deploymentId/execute`
